visual_description: Two men in dark suits walk side-by-side on a dimly lit, elevated walkway at night. The man in front has short, light-colored hair and carries a briefcase, while the man behind has dark hair. They walk with purpose, their faces partially illuminated by distant, greenish streetlights.
audio_description: A dramatic, suspenseful musical score plays, featuring low strings and a building sense of tension.
